audit_findings_closed: F10 PatternStore refresh failure set unsurfaced lastError
F11 PatternStore digest generation failure set unsurfaced lastError

decision.description: Remove PatternStore.lastError as dead UI state and keep failures diagnostic-only.
rationale: PatternStore.refresh is triggered from app appearance and foreground lifecycle, not a direct user action.
Pattern snapshot and digest data are optional insight surfaces; failing to refresh them should not interrupt the main Today workflow.
An alert would be noisy because it could fire during app lifecycle refresh.
An inline digest-list row would not help when no latest digest exists and the digest list is not reachable from Today.
The previous lastError was not read anywhere, so it created a false impression of user-visible error handling.

code_changes: Removed PatternStore.lastError from Combine and non-Combine declarations.
Changed refresh failure handling to PerformanceTelemetry.notice("PatternStore refresh failed: ...", category: .patterns).
Changed digest generation failure handling to PerformanceTelemetry.notice("PatternStore digest generation failed: ...", category: .patterns).

user_visible_copy.reason: The chosen model is a refactor/dead-state removal, not a localized user-facing copy surface.

scope_boundaries: Did not change PatternEngine, WeeklyDigestRules, or digest generation behavior.
Did not add an alert or inline status row.
Did not touch localization resources or review return files.
Did not alter Today or digest navigation UI.

validation.make automation-check: passed (pyright 0 errors / 0 warnings; localization-review-drift-check 0 drift; 93 automation tests)
